content: Veterinary EMR/PIMS architecture: Patient management (species, breed, age, microchip), appointment scheduling, SOAP clinical notes, vaccination records, lab results, billing, inventory, client communication. VetCare (.NET 8 Clean Architecture) models: Tenant, User, Owner, Pet, Appointment, Vaccination aggregates. Medical records are hybrid: system of record for immutable pet identity, contributory database for mutable clinical observations. Key design: multi-tenancy via EF Core global query filters, transactional outbox for domain events.
